classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: waves, acoustics, and fluid dynamics

theory.canonical_statement: ID3826 records Gyromagnetic Pressure Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\refactored_derivations.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \[Psi]_, \[Pi]_] := Module[{Tkin, Umag, Uquant, Hcouple}, Tkin = 1/2 \[Pi] . InverseMetric[\[Psi]] . \[Pi]; Umag = -MuEff[\[Psi]] . BExternal[r_cm[\[Psi]]] + (Mu0/(8 Pi)) VolumeIntegral[(Norm[Bdipole]^2 + Norm[Bgyro]^2), {r, V}]; Uquant = Sum[\[HBar] omega[n] (n_n + 1/2), {n, 1, Infinity}] + UTunnel[d[\[Psi]]]; Hcouple = (gfactor MuB/\[HBar]) Lgyro[\[Psi]] . MuEff[\[Psi]] + \[Lambda]coupling A[r_obs] . Jgyro[\[Psi]]; Tkin + Umag + Uquant + Hcouple ]; (* Hamilton's equations *) EquationsOfMotion[F_] := PoissonBracket[F, Hamiltonian[\[Psi], \[Pi]]]; \end{implementation} \section{Quantum and Instanton Analysis} This part of the appendix develops the quantum field theoretic description of the gy ...
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: \[Psi]_, \[Pi]_] := Module[{Tkin, Umag, Uquant, Hcouple}, Tkin = 1/2 \[Pi] . InverseMetric[\[Psi]] . \[Pi]; Umag = -MuEff[\[Psi]] . BExternal[r_cm[\[Psi]]] + (Mu0/(8 Pi)) VolumeIntegral[(Norm[Bdipole]^2 + Norm[Bgyro]^2), {r, V}]; Uquant = Sum[\[HBar] omega[n] (n_n + 1/2), {n, 1, Infinity}] + UTunnel[d[\[Psi]]]; Hcouple = (gfactor MuB/\[HBar]) Lgyro[\[Psi]] . MuEff[\[Psi]] + \[Lambda]coupling A[r_obs] . Jgyro[\[Psi]]; Tkin + Umag + Uquant + Hcouple ]; (* Hamilton's equations *) EquationsOfMotion[F_] := PoissonBracket[F, Hamiltonian[\[Psi], \[Pi]]]; \end{implementation} \section{Quantum and Instanton Analysis} This part of the appendix develops the quantum field theoretic description of the gy ...
